prompt:
Scene:
A square abstract painting presented frontally as if photographed from a modern art archive, with flat even lighting that preserves paper grain, brush drag, and crisp ink lines. The image should feel like a complete radial composition rather than a poster, with a pale warm ground and highly controlled color intervals around a central circular anchor.

Subject:
A Kandinsky inspired geometry mandala composed of concentric circles, arcs, black structural lines, small triangles, checker accents, floating dots, color wedges, and balanced asymmetries that still resolve into a stable wheel. The central disk should hold the composition while surrounding sectors introduce reds, cobalt, mustard, ivory, black, and muted teal. Although the design borrows from early twentieth-century abstract painting, it must still read as a mandala: a centered, radiating order where each segment echoes across the circle and every opposing quadrant feels intentionally counterweighted.

Important details:
The challenge is disciplined abstraction, not chaos. Preserve exact circular centering, visible ring structure, and deliberate relationships between geometric fragments. Brush textures may remain human and slightly imperfect, but the radial logic must be undeniable. Balance dense graphic zones against open breathing space so the image remains elegant from far away and rewarding up close. The abstract shapes should suggest music, motion, and thought without breaking the mandala framework.

Use case:
Mandala Precision Geometry single study 3/8, testing whether modern abstract language can still obey mandala-like radial precision.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no random splatter field, no collage scraps, no off-center composition, no photorealistic objects, no human figure, no frame, no typography, no muddy color blending.
title: Kandinsky Geometry Wheel
description: A centered abstract mandala that combines concentric circles, black linear scaffolds, and modernist color wedges with controlled balance.

generation.runner_notes: Independent mandala study translating modern abstract geometry into radial order.

en.title: Kandinsky Geometry Wheel
en.description: A centered abstract mandala that combines concentric circles, black linear scaffolds, and modernist color wedges with controlled balance.

zh-CN.title: 康定斯基几何轮
zh-CN.description: 一张居中的抽象曼荼罗，将同心圆、黑色结构线与现代主义色块楔形组合成受控的平衡系统。

alt.en: A modern abstract radial mandala built from circles, lines, and balanced color wedges.
alt.zh-CN: 一张由圆形、线条与平衡色块楔形构成的现代抽象放射曼荼罗。
